name: create-neck-stack
description: Create NECK stack apps: Nuxt.js, Encore.ts, Caddy, and Komodo.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/create-neck-stack.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/generate-encore-config.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/generate-client.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/generate-openapi.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/watch-client.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/run-migrations.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/install.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/deploy-komodo.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/build-backend-image.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/build-migrations-image.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/lib/encore-resources.mjs && node --check ./templates/default/scripts/lib/prod-platform.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['templates/default/_vscode/launch.json','templates/default/_vscode/tasks.json','templates/default/_vscode/mcp.json','templates/default/_vscode/settings.json','templates/default/_vscode/extensions.json','templates/default/_zed/settings.json','templates/default/_zed/debug.json','templates/default/_zed/tasks.json']) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))" && pnpm test:neckdash && pnpm --filter neckdash-ui typecheck
scripts.docker:neckdash: cd neckdash && encore build docker --config infra.prod.json ${NECKDASH_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/thetechquant/neck-stack/neckdash:local}
